# Public Boat Ramps Directory — LLM-Friendly Site Summary

> A free directory of public boat ramps, launches, and water access points across the United States.

## About
- Domain: publicboatramps.com
- Type: Location directory
- Coverage: All 50 US states, 102+ public boat ramp locations
- Data: GPS coordinates, amenities, access hours, fees, ramp type

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://publicboatramps.com): Browse all public boat ramps by state
- [Editorial](https://publicboatramps.com/editorial): Guides and expert content
- [Privacy Policy](https://publicboatramps.com/privacy): MODPA/GDPR/CCPA compliant, honors GPC signals
- [About](https://publicboatramps.com/about): Mission and editorial standards
- [Contact](https://publicboatramps.com/contact): Get in touch

## Data Coverage
Each boat ramp listing includes: name, state, county, GPS coordinates, address, amenities (parking, restrooms, courtesy dock, fishing pier), ramp type (concrete/gravel), fee information, and seasonal availability.

## Sitemap
https://publicboatramps.com/sitemap.xml
